cards.prompt: Action a с тремя += (Append A/B/C), затем a(); печать sb и длины invocation list?
cards.code: using System; using System.Text; var sb = new StringBuilder(); Action a = () => sb.Append("A"); a += () => sb.Append("B"); a += () => sb.Append("C"); a(); Console.WriteLine(sb); Console.WriteLine(a.GetInvocationList().Length);

cards.prompt: Func<int> combo = one+two+three; combo(); combo -= two; combo(); длина списка — три строки?
cards.code: using System; Func<int> one = () => 1; Func<int> two = () => 2; Func<int> three = () => 3; Func<int> combo = one + two + three; Console.WriteLine(combo()); combo -= two; Console.WriteLine(combo()); Console.WriteLine(combo.GetInvocationList().Length);

cards.prompt: Action combo = m+m+m; combo -= m; combo(); печать sb и длины списка (удаление дубликата)?
cards.code: using System; using System.Text; var sb = new StringBuilder(); Action m = () => sb.Append("X"); Action combo = m + m + m; combo -= m; combo(); Console.WriteLine(sb); Console.WriteLine(combo.GetInvocationList().Length);
